'111: oll ~-- MIN1SIRY OF AGRO AND RURAL INDUsfRIES Nffi1FICAUON New Delhi, the 17th August, 2006 __-- G.S.R. 484(E).- The following bye-Jaws made by the Coir Board, in eXercise of the powers conferred by section 27 of the Coir Industry Ac~ 1953 (45 of 1953), further to amend the Coir Board'(SerVices)'"~ye-laws, 1983 and confirmed by the Central Government are hereby published as required by sub-section 2 of the said section 27, namely:- 1.(1) These bye-laws may be called the Coir Board (Services) Amendment Bye-laws, 2006. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2.
